title: Department of Deployment

frontmatter.title: Department of Deployment
frontmatter.description: Deployment sequencing — ordering the rollout so capital, coverage, and demand are balanced across the build program.

body:
# Department of Deployment

In what order the network should be built. Agents sequence rollouts so coverage gains, demand
coverage, and capital are balanced across waves of the build program.

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [GROW-310](courses/grow-310.md) | Rollout Sequencing | Advanced | 4 | GROW-210 |

Part of the [School of Growth & Planning](../../index.md).
